const Navbar = ({ title, subtitle, user, onMenuToggle }) => { return (

{title}

{subtitle}

Signed in

{user?.restaurantName || user?.name || 'Restaurant Owner'}

{user?.email || 'owner@example.com'}

); }; export default Navbar;
